title: A Cry From the Heart
description: Unikingdom film festival debut, a blockbuster about the most dangerous thing of all: love. His love for her burned eternal, like a campfire made of the sun. But he never had the guts to tell her of his longing until today.
quote: I’m here to tell you about the love that’s churning in my guts.
alt1: Hawkodile holding up a boombox outside a house
alt2: Hawkodile dressed as a woman, Professor Not Fox, hugging a cardboard stand-in, Smooth Jerkerson
alt3: Hawkodile pointing, angry, surrounded by fire
alt4: Professor Not Fox proposing with a ring
